obs: User has Crohn's disease; experiencing fatigue lately, planning to check iron levels with doctor.
Recently returned from 5-day trip to Chicago last month; used black Fjallraven Kanken backpack (16L) successfully for entire trip.
User has laptop with touchscreen; recently got new stylus pen; using touchscreen more frequently for note-taking.
Started ukulele lessons with friend Rachel today; having fun; learning chord changes and fingerpicking techniques.
Owns Taylor GS Mini guitar; action is high causing left hand discomfort; planning to take to guitar tech Joe at Guitar Central by end of month.
Planning to sell Hohner Special 20 harmonica on eBay; hasn't played in ages; just collecting dust.
Organizing closet using color-coded system and vertical space; storing winter clothes in bins; implementing borrowed items system.
Lent green sweater to sister on January 25th; expecting return soon; tracking borrowed items in designated closet section.
Received new silver necklace from partner on Valentine's Day; planning to wear to wedding on March 15th.
Red cocktail dress needs shortening; booked tailor appointment to have it altered before wedding on March 15th.
Exchanged sandals purchased February 5th for larger size; hasn't picked them up yet; planning to wear with yellow sundress to wedding.
Got first Blue Apron meal kit delivery; recipes: salmon with roasted veggies, chicken fajitas, veggie stir-fry.
Bought chicken breasts at Walmart last Sunday; chose Yukon Gold potatoes for Lemon Garlic Chicken with roasted veggies recipe.
Has Cabernet Sauvignon Two-Buck Chuck from Trader Joe's; planning to try with Lemon Garlic Chicken meal; will let wine breathe first.
2018 Toyota Camry: got oil changed and tires rotated last week; planning road trip next weekend; need to check brake pads soon.
Planning to sell 2007 Honda CBR600RR motorcycle; researching competitive pricing using Cycle Trader, KBB, local classifieds.
Listening to educational podcasts during daily commutes: How I Built This, Stuff You Should Know.
Taking Coursera course on Data Science; completed Crash Course YouTube series on World History; interested in Sapiens by Yuval Noah Harari.
Interested in books for relaxation: The Night Circus, Guernsey Literary and Potato Peel Pie Society, Little Paris Bookshop recommended.
Practices yoga at 6:30 pm weekdays after work; setting digital reminders on phone calendar; wants to vary routine and try Yoga With Adriene on YouTube.
Currently has Yamaha P-125 keyboard; budget $500-$1000 for new keyboard; prefers weighted keys, wants recording capability and USB connectivity.
Spent $50 on silver necklace for sister's birthday last month; tracking gift expenses using spreadsheet method with categories: Jewelry, Experiences, Home Goods, etc.
Music room contains harmonica, guitar, keyboard; organizing instruments and accessories.
Planning to participate in charity bike ride soon; needs to service road bike; will take to new bike shop near apartment.
Planning weekend run; got new running shorts from downtown outlet store; comfortable breathable fabric with built-in liner.
Considering water bottle with insulation and built-in filter for running; has old crappy water bottle currently.
Planning to get new yoga mat soon; interested in eco-friendly, non-slip options with good grip and appropriate thickness.
Attending wedding on March 15th; bride is close friend; looking forward to celebrating and catching up with friends and family.
Assistant role-played as Zarina, spiritual teacher focused on divine feminine, spiritual awakening; discussed spirituality topics.
Developing .NET 6.0 web API; considering Keycloak for authentication; planning to call controller from React Native with access tokens.
